description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, defines RELEASE_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest and TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, and sets three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs the before_script to log in to registry.gitlab.com, then executes "docker build -t $TEST_IMAGE ." followed by "docker push $TEST_IMAGE". In the test stage add a test job that runs "docker run $TEST_IMAGE --version", creates a fdroid directory if missing, cd's into it, runs "docker run -v $(pwd):/repo $TEST_IMAGE init --verbose", installs wget via "apk add --no-cache wget", downloads a test APK with "wget -O repo/test.apk https://gitlab.com/fdroid/fdroidserver/raw/1.0.3/tests/repo/info.zwanenburg.caffeinetile_4.apk", runs "docker run -v $(pwd):/repo $TEST_IMAGE update --verbose --create-metadata", then verifies the generated repo files with "test -e repo/index-v1.jar", "test -e repo/index.jar", "test -e repo/index.xml" and checks the XML content with "grep -F '<application id=' repo/index.xml > /dev/null". In the release stage add a release job that runs only on the master branch (excluding schedules), runs the before_script login, then executes "docker pull $TEST_IMAGE", "docker tag $TEST_IMAGE $RELEASE_IMAGE", and "docker push $RELEASE_IMAGE" to publish the final image.
